  • Surf Scoter
    More info
    eBird
     2 Musselburgh--Sea Wall (Victor Del Veneziano) "Among some velvets. Water was very choppy, and they just wouldn't lift their heads up so couldn't see bill, though there was a distinct patch on the back of the heads."
  • Velvet Scoter
    More info
    eBird
     X Musselburgh--Sea Wall (Victor Del Veneziano) "100ish. Some flocking with other velvets, some with eiders."
